name: hatchkit
description: Interactive CLI for scaffolding full-stack projects and provisioning observability/email clients

scripts.check: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run lint && pnpm run test
scripts.release:patch: node scripts/release-prep.mjs && npm version patch -m "chore: release v%s" && pnpm run _release:finish
scripts.release:minor: node scripts/release-prep.mjs && npm version minor -m "chore: release v%s" && pnpm run _release:finish
scripts.release:major: node scripts/release-prep.mjs && npm version major -m "chore: release v%s" && pnpm run _release:finish
scripts._release:finish: pnpm run build && pnpm run typecheck && npm publish --access public && git -C ../infra push && git -C ../starter push && git push --follow-tags && npm install -g .
